phases.exitCriteria: You can scan a QR code, open the app, log in with email, and see a home screen in your device language.

tasks.notes: Magic link via OTP (6-digit code). AuthProvider with session tracking, useProtectedRoute hook for route guarding. (auth)/login.tsx functional but unstyled. Auth keys added to i18n. Deep link scheme ronex:// ready, needs Supabase dashboard redirect URL config.

tasks.title: Design login/signup screens
tasks.notes: 3 premium screens: welcome.tsx (wordmark + dual CTA), login.tsx (email input + magic link), verify.tsx (6-box OTP with auto-advance, paste support, auto-submit, 60s resend cooldown). All NativeWind, all i18n, all accessible. Flow: welcome → login → verify → (tabs).

tasks.title: Basic home screen (placeholder, post-login)
tasks.notes: Dashboard home: time-based greeting, gradient Start Workout CTA, 3-col stats row (placeholders), recent workouts empty state. 4 tabs: Home, Workout, Stats, Profile (with sign-out). All i18n, NativeWind, Ionicons. expo-linear-gradient installed.

tasks.title: Configure eas.json and app.json for builds
tasks.notes: eas.json met development/preview/production profiles. .easignore excludes docs/dashboard/.claude. Placeholders voor EAS project ID, Apple Team ID, ASC app ID — invullen bij eerste build.

tasks.title: Test on physical iPhone via Expo Go
tasks.notes: LAN mode via Expo Go werkt (ngrok/tunnel faalde). Login via 6-digit OTP succesvol, user zit in app op home screen. Observaties: app werkt technisch, maar leeg en visueel nog niet premium. babel.config.js toegevoegd voor NativeWind v4 + Reanimated. Supabase email template staat nog op 8-digit code, moet handmatig naar 6 digits.

tasks.title: Extend design tokens: 3 typographic levels (display-lg, body, small-caps)
tasks.notes: SPEC §14 Rule 5 mandates exactly 3 typographic levels per screen. Add/align tokens: display-lg (28-32px screen titles/primary data), body (16-18px sections/secondary), small-caps (11-12px labels/metadata). Document in lib/theme.ts and tailwind.config.js. Existing 6 typography presets moeten tegen deze 3-niveau hierarchie gemapped worden — cut or collapse where redundant. 2026-04-18: designer produces mockup-proposal FIRST (specs table + mapping + preview), Johnny approves, then implementation + apply to welcome/login/verify screens so change is visible on Expo Go. Phase B shipped. tailwind.config.js + lib/theme.ts updated. Applied to welcome/login/verify/home. 2 documented exceptions: welcome wordmark (52px) + OTP digits (24px) — see docs/design-system.md. Fast Refresh picks up on Johnny's Expo Go instantly.

tasks.title: Refactor tab navigation: 4 tabs (Challenge default, Workout dominant, Stats, Profile)

New: 4 tabs, Challenge tab = default landing (replaces Home), Workout = visually dominant (largest icon, lime accent). Redirect issue opgelost door (tabs)/index.tsx Redirect component naar challenge te zetten (expo-router default resolution via index-route). tasks.title: Design Supabase schema: profiles table + RLS policies
tasks.notes: Built idempotent migration at supabase/migrations/20260418000000_profiles.sql (229 SQL lines). Contents: 7 enums (biological_sex_t, level_t, language_t, usage_type_t, onboarding_type_t, experience_bucket_t, injury_t 15 values) wrapped in do-blocks with duplicate_object guards; banned_display_names lookup table seeded with 41 words (11 impersonation + 15 NL + 15 EN profanity) via on-conflict-do-nothing; check_display_name_allowed() trigger with PostgreSQL word-boundary regex (\m...\M); profiles table with all 17 columns per proposal (id PK→auth.users CASCADE, display_name CHECK 1-40, nullable identity fields until onboarding_completed_at is set, focus_muscle_groups+injuries NOT NULL default '{}', timezone default 'Europe/Amsterdam'); handle_updated_at() trigger on BEFORE UPDATE; handle_new_user() SECURITY DEFINER trigger on auth.users AFTER INSERT for auto-profile-creation; 3 RLS policies on profiles (select/update/insert own via auth.uid()=id), plus deny-all RLS on banned_display_names. Also scaffolded supabase/config.toml stub (project_id placeholder 'ronex', no CLI link yet). No deviations from approved proposal. How to apply: open Supabase dashboard (ambnbzvrgvqpiniksklf) → SQL editor → paste migration file contents → run. Alternatively once CLI is linked: `supabase db push`. Verification queries after apply: `select count(*) from public.banned_display_names;` should return 41; `select count(*) from pg_type where typname in ('biological_sex_t','level_t','language_t','usage_type_t','onboarding_type_t','experience_bucket_t','injury_t');` should return 7; `select tablename from pg_tables where schemaname='public';` should include profiles + banned_display_names; `select policyname from pg_policies where schemaname='public' and tablename='profiles';` should return 3 rows. Also fixed a pre-existing missing comma after the T-101 entry in tasks.json that broke JSON parsing.

Finale totals: 118 exercises / 88 challenge_suitable / 30 niet / 74%. Q1-Q9 allemaal resolved. Downstream: T-201 +0.5u, T-209 +1.5u, T-304 +0.5u, T-713 +1u (totaal +3.5u, doorgevoerd in tasks.json). tasks.title: Design Supabase schema: exercises + categories tables
tasks.notes: 2026-04-18: Started. Building migration per approved proposal (temp-files/t-103-exercise-library-proposal.md). Scope: 6 new enums (muscle_t, equipment_t, pattern_t, difficulty_t, leverage_t, logging_t) + exercises table with 14 columns (slug-PK id, name, primary_muscle, secondary_muscles[], equipment, movement_pattern, is_compound, is_unilateral, difficulty, gender_bias_factor, bodyweight_leverage, logging_type, challenge_suitable, created_at) + RLS (public read, authenticated, no writes). No separate categories table — muscle_t enum replaces it per proposal. Seed data is T-104/T-105 scope, not T-103. Delivered: supabase/migrations/20260418010000_exercises.sql with all 6 enums (idempotent do-blocks), exercises table (14 NOT NULL columns, slug-PK, gender_bias_factor CHECK [1.00, 2.00], secondary_muscles[] default '{}'), two indexes (primary_muscle full idx, challenge_suitable partial idx WHERE true), and RLS stance per spec (RLS ON + single exercises_select_all policy FOR SELECT TO authenticated USING true, zero write policies — seeds via service_role bypass RLS). Apply via Supabase SQL editor or Management API query endpoint.

tasks.title: Curate canonical exercise list (~100-150 exercises, NL+EN names)
tasks.notes: 2026-04-18: Started. Converting the approved 118-exercise list from temp-files/t-103-exercise-library-proposal.md into data/exercises.json (single source of truth for T-105 seed script). Per proposal decision: English names only (international gym lingua franca), no NL translations needed. Scope: parse 11 markdown tables into JSON array, validate counts per muscle (13/13/13/10/10/5/16/9/10/6/13 = 118), validate challenge_suitable split (88 true / 30 false), validate every id is a valid slug. 2026-04-18 DONE: Delivered data/exercises.json (118 objects, 13 fields each, pretty 2-space indent). All structural checks PASS: length=118, per-muscle counts all match (13/13/13/10/10/5/16/9/10/6/13), 118 unique ids, all ids match slug regex ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$, all enum values valid against 6 enum sets, all gender_bias_factor values in [1.00, 2.00], every object has exactly the 13 required fields. Edge cases handled: burpee.secondary='full body' prose dropped from source → secondary_muscles=[]; dead-hang primary=forearms per section header; weighted-sit-up logging_type=weight_reps; back-extension=hinge pattern. ANOMALY FOUND in source proposal: §Challenge-suitable analysis summary sentence claims '88 true / 30 false / 74%' but the enumerated exclusion bullet list contains 40 items (14 machine + 16 cable + 10 technical-risk) which matches exactly the per-row ✗/✓ markers in the 11 tables. Actual ratio from per-row markers = 78 true / 40 false (66%). Task spec instructed to use the per-row markers as source of truth, so JSON reflects 78/40. Recommend flagging for Johnny whether to reclassify 10 items (e.g. some cable isolation exercises) back to true to hit the ~80% challenge-suitability target noted in the proposal, OR update proposal summary to match the 78/40 reality. Tracking as non-blocking for T-105 seed (seed script inserts what's in the JSON). 2026-04-18 RECLASSIFICATION (Johnny's call, Option C): flipped 19 exercises false → true to reach 97/21 (82.2%). Flipped: 9 machines (machine-chest-press, pec-deck, leg-press, leg-extension, hack-squat, lying-leg-curl, seated-leg-curl, machine-hip-thrust, hip-abduction-machine — accepted despite brand variance), 5 calves (all calf-raise variants — low stakes), 4 cable (face-pull, pallof-press, cable-crunch, cable-wood-chopper — common movements), 1 barbell (sumo-deadlift — recognized powerlifting variant). Kept FALSE (21): 12 cable isolation (pulley ratio truly varies), 7 technical/injury-risk (pendlay-row, push-press, good-morning, nordic-hamstring-curl, glute-ham-raise, sissy-squat, stiff-leg-deadlift), 2 trivial wrist curls. data/exercises.json updated; temp-files/t-103-exercise-library-proposal.md synchronized (per-row markers, analysis section rebuilt with new categorization, count totals updated to 97/21/82.2%). All enum/id/count validations still PASS. Ready for T-105.

tasks.title: Seed exercises table with canonical list
tasks.notes: 2026-04-18: Started. Building seed migration that inserts all 118 exercises from data/exercises.json into public.exercises. File: supabase/migrations/20260418020000_exercises_seed.sql. Must be idempotent (on conflict do nothing or upsert on id) so re-applying doesn't error. Main agent will apply via Supabase Management API after review. 2026-04-18 DONE: Delivered supabase/migrations/20260418020000_exercises_seed.sql (155 lines, 20968 bytes). Generated programmatically via a throwaway Node script that read data/exercises.json, escaped apostrophes (only occurrence: 'Farmer''s Walk'), emitted muscle_t[] array casts (ARRAY[...]::muscle_t[] for non-empty, ARRAY[]::muscle_t[] for 48 rows with empty secondary_muscles), and formatted gender_bias_factor as 2-decimal numeric to match numeric(3,2). Structure: one multi-row INSERT with 13-column list followed by exactly 118 VALUES tuples (verified: regex match on /^  \(/gm = 118), terminated with ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET updating all 12 non-id columns from EXCLUDED (preserves created_at default). Enum literals are bare quoted strings — Postgres auto-casts inside VALUES. Spot-checks all PASS: (1) first chest 'barbell-bench-press' → ARRAY['triceps','shoulders']::muscle_t[], 'barbell', 1.35, 'weight_reps', true. (2) 'dumbbell-fly' → ARRAY[]::muscle_t[] empty secondary, 'isolation' pattern. (3) 'farmers-walk' → apostrophe correctly doubled to 'Farmer''s Walk', logging_type='time_seconds'. (4) 'push-up' reps_only + bodyweight 'partial'. (5) last row 'weighted-sit-up' has no trailing comma before ON CONFLICT. No 'create_at' field in column list. Helper generator script was deleted after use (no .js artifact in repo). Apply instructions for main agent: POST the file contents to Supabase Management API /pg-meta query endpoint (same channel used for T-101 / T-103); verify with `select count(*) from public.exercises;` → 118, `select count(*) filter (where challenge_suitable) from public.exercises;` → 97, `select logging_type, count(*) from public.exercises group by 1;` → weight_reps 90 / reps_only 22 / time_seconds 6. Re-running the migration is safe (upsert path, created_at unchanged). No gotchas beyond the single apostrophe in 'Farmer''s Walk'.

Typography rule-5 clean on both screens (welcome: 52px exception + body + small-caps; enter-code: display-lg + body + small-caps). Accessibility: all Pressables labelled and roled, decorative glow hidden, banner announces as alert. Inline strings (flagged for Copy T-114): 'CODE' field label (identical NL/EN), onboarding.enterCodeSubtitle added to i18n inline by Designer (NL: 'Plak 'm hier om mee te doen aan een challenge.' / EN: 'Paste it here to join a challenge.'). Verified via Johnny on physical iPhone after resolving two runtime issues: (a) port conflict on 8081 resolved by killing stale PID 9428, (b) Metro cache staleness causing 'Unable to resolve module ./ExpoClipboard' error fixed with npx expo start --clear. Johnny confirmed no visible regressions post-login (Home/tabs unchanged as expected — welcome flow is pre-auth only). tasks.title: Progression rule helper (double-progression, conservative)
tasks.notes: Pure helper `lib/progression/suggest.ts`. API: `suggestNext(lastSet, exercise) => { hint: { kgDelta?: number, repDelta?: number, copyKey: string, copyVars?: object }, trend: 'up'|'same'|'down'|null }`. Regels: COMPOUND (is_compound=true, rep-range 8-10): alle sets 10+ reps → +2.5kg reset 8 reps; 8-9 reps → zelfde kg +1 rep; <8 reps → stabiliseer. ISOLATION (is_compound=false, 10-12): idem maar +1.25kg increment. REPS_ONLY (bodyweight): geen kg, altijd +1 rep vs vorige. TIME_SECONDS: +5sec vs vorige. TREND: current-typed vs last → up/same/down (nullable als nog niks getypt). EDGE: geen last-set → copyKey 'progression.firstTime'; last >4 weken geleden → copyKey 'progression.longGap'. i18n-copy-keys met placeholders toevoegen in en.json + nl.json (bijv. 'progression.tryMoreReps' = 'Vorige: {{kg}}kg × {{reps}}. Probeer +1 rep.'). Unit-testbaar, géén Supabase-call hier — hook `useLastSetForExercise` (T-210) levert input. Geen render — dat is T-211b. 2026-04-19 DEFERRED: priority high → medium. Reden: parallel-tranche UX-herziening (pre-fill uit historie + carry-forward + steppers, via `lib/exerciseStep.ts` + `addSetWithPrefill`) levert de 80% progressie-UX via dumb copy-last-values heuristiek. Pas na device-ship van die UX-herziening en 1-2 weken gebruik kan Johnny voelen of de smart bump-nudge (3×8 → 82.5×5) extra waarde geeft boven de stepper-tap. Herzien na dat feedback-moment.

tasks.title: PR detection logic on workout complete (incl. tie-break)
tasks.notes: Regel: gelijk gewicht + meer reps = PR-UPDATE (overschrijven). Rationale: sterker worden op zelfde kg IS progressie, hypertrofie-reps erkend. Schema: `personal_records` unique (user_id, exercise_id, metric) bestaat al (migration 20260419105008). Voeg migration toe die `personal_records` uitbreidt: optie A nullable smallint `reps_context`, optie B `context_json jsonb` — backend kiest (advies A: simpeler + queryable). Logica per metric: `max_weight`: nieuwe set met weight_kg == current_pr.value EN reps > current_pr.reps_context → UPDATE; weight_kg > current_pr.value → UPDATE (nieuwe kg, reset reps_context). `max_reps`, `max_time_seconds`, `max_1rm_estimated`: strict greater-than wint, gelijk = geen update. Return per PR-hit een `level`: 'new_weight' (nieuwe kg) of 'updated_weight' (zelfde kg meer reps) of 'new_reps'/'new_time'/'new_1rm' — T-215 gebruikt dit voor celebration-niveaus (GROOT vs KLEIN). +0.5h in estimate voor migration-uitbreiding.

tasks.title: PR celebration UI (moment, not inflation)
tasks.notes: 2026-04-19 PM-tranche enrichment. PRIMAIRE REFERENTIE: iOS Activity-app ring-close moment (Apple Move/Exercise ring fill). Patroon: ring vult ~500ms met animation, twee korte haptic success-tikjes, kleine in-place text-overlay 'Move goal complete', verdwijnt auto na 2-3s, GEEN modal, GEEN full-screen, user kan doorgaan zonder tap. Vertaling naar Ronex: IN-PLACE animation op de set-row die PR was (NIET full-screen). Lime-accent (colors.primary) 'glow' rond row voor 600-800ms, text-overlay naast row: 'PR · +2.5 kg' of 'PR · +2 reps'. Haptics: Haptics.notificationAsync(Success) — subtiel success-pattern, geen jubel. Verdwijnt automatisch, user blijft in flow. Optional subtle sound (default OFF, user-toggle in profile-tab = POST-MVP, zie SPEC §16). Celebration-niveaus gedreven door T-214 `level` output: 'new_weight' = GROTE celebration (fuller glow animation + wider overlay), 'updated_weight' (zelfde kg meer reps) = KLEINE celebration (subtiel accent, korter). VERMIJDEN expliciet: Duolingo streak-fire, Strava prominent post-run banner, Peloton leaderboard pop-ups, full-screen takeover, confetti, auto-share forcing, inflation. Designer instructie: ~70% minder visueel gewicht dan typische Duolingo-patroon. 'Erkennen, niet vieren.' Tone: 'Knap gedaan' niet 'WOW AWESOME'. Post-workout FinishSheet: prominente lijst '2 PRs vandaag', tap voor details, GEEN forced social share. PM-ACTIE: designer-agent mockup-proposal vragen NA T-214 completion (blocker). Per design-mockup rule: mockup-proposal FIRST, Johnny approves, dan implementation.

tasks.title: Configure Anthropic API key in Supabase secrets
Write generate-workout Edge Function skeleton
tasks.notes: 2026-04-19 PM-tranche. MODEL + API SETTINGS: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 via id `claude-sonnet-4-6` (of `-latest` alias — check Anthropic docs bij implementation voor best practice). Prompt caching ENABLED: `cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' }` op system prompt (system prompt bevat exercise library JSON + user profile snapshot — beide groot + static per request). Temperature: 0.7 (variatie zonder willekeur). Max tokens: 2500 (10 exercises met rationale past). Cost-model: ~$0.03-0.04 per workout → 99% marge op €3.99/mnd. AUTH: Supabase client JWT (geen service role) — Edge Function ontvangt user JWT via Authorization header, extracts user_id server-side, nooit trust client-provided user_id. RATE-LIMIT FLOW: voor Anthropic-call eerst T-306 rate-limit check tegen `ai_generation_usage` table (T-306a levert schema); bij quotum-overschrijding 429 response zonder Anthropic-call. LOGGING FLOW: na succesvolle generation log naar `ai_generation_logs` (T-306a levert schema) met tokens_in/out/cached_tokens, cost_usd, duration_ms, success_bool, error_message NULL. Bij failure: log success=false + error, quotum NIET verbruiken (fairness). Estimate 2u → 2.5u (+0.5u) voor rate-limit wiring + logging. Regenerate-button (binnen 60s na eerste gen) telt als 1 quotum NIET 2 — implementeer via idempotency-key header of short-window dedup check.

tasks.title: Design Claude prompt for workout generation
tasks.notes: 2026-04-18 (profiles-patch): estimate 2.5u → 3.5u (+1u). Bovenop de bestaande challenge_suitable filter moet de prompt nu ook injury-based exercise filtering toepassen via mapping tussen injury_t enum (15 values uit profiles.injuries) en exercise-tags — bv. lower_back → skip good-mornings/conventional deadlift-variants bij advanced, knee_left/right → skip heavy squat-variants, shoulder_* → skip overhead press-variants, etc. Mapping moet expliciet in de prompt-system-message + test-cases per injury. 'other' injury = geen auto-filter, prompt moet generiek voorzichtig zijn. Historische bump: 2026-04-18 (exercise-library-patch): 2u → 2.5u voor challenge_suitable filter. 2026-04-19 PM-tranche: WORKOUT SHAPE experience-gescaled. Exercise-count ranges per experience_bucket: Beginner (<1y) 5-7 exercises, Intermediate (1-3y) 6-8, Advanced (3-5y) 7-9, Advanced (5+y) 8-10. Binnen ranges: Full body → hoge kant, Upper/Lower → midden, PPL → midden, Custom → AI bepaalt op context. STRUCTUUR binnen elke workout (prompt-engineering guidance, expliciet in system message): eerste 2-3 oefeningen = primary compound lifts (heaviest, multi-joint), middle 2-3 = secondary compounds of heavy isolation, laatste 2-3 = accessory isolation (curls, laterals, calves). GEEN expliciete warmup, GEEN expliciete cooldown (user's responsibility — spec in system prompt). DURATION-ESTIMATE uitgerekend op 3-4 sets × 2min rest: 6 exercises ≈ 45-60 min, 8 ≈ 60-75 min, 10 ≈ 75-90 min — AI toont deze inschatting in generation preview (UI in T-307). Rationale tegen Haiku: te beperkt voor nuanced injury/equipment edge cases, Sonnet nodig voor kwaliteit + injury-mapping.

tasks.title: JSON schema validation on AI output
Migrations: ai_generation_usage + ai_generation_logs tables
tasks.notes: 2026-04-19 PM-tranche NEW. Carved uit T-306 zodat schema af is voordat T-303 gebouwd wordt. PM-BESLISSING: APARTE TABLES (advies A gekozen boven hergebruik bestaande telemetrie — ai_generation_logs krijgt kostprijs-data die niet in generieke events hoort, en usage-table is hot-path voor rate-limit check). MIGRATION 1 — `ai_generation_usage`: columns (user_id uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, week_start date NOT NULL, count smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK (count >= 0), updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()), PRIMARY KEY (user_id, week_start). RLS: user kan eigen rij lezen, geen direct-write (alleen server-side via Edge Function met service role key). week_start = lokale maandag 00:00 volgens profiles.timezone (consistent met T-725 weekly rollup — hergebruik dezelfde tz-aware date-computation). MIGRATION 2 — `ai_generation_logs`: columns (id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, created_at timestamptz default now(), success boolean NOT NULL, tokens_in int, tokens_out int, cached_tokens int, cost_usd numeric(8,6), duration_ms int, model_id text, error_message text, request_payload jsonb, response_summary jsonb). RLS: user leest eigen rows (debugging transparency), service role all-access. Indexen: (user_id, created_at desc) voor per-user log queries, (success, created_at desc) voor cost-monitoring dashboards. Beide migrations idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS). Apply via Supabase Management API (MCP), zelfde channel als T-101/T-103.

tasks.title: formatWeight helper + i18n keys kg/lb
tasks.notes: 2026-04-19 PM-tranche NEW. Utility `lib/units/formatWeight.ts` met signature: `formatWeight(kg: number, unit: 'kg' | 'lb', opts?: { decimals?: number }): string`. Conversie: lb = kg × 2.2046226218. Default decimals: kg=1 (bv '82.5 kg'), lb=0 (bv '182 lb'). Return format: numeric + space + unit-label via i18n. i18n keys toevoegen: `units.kg` ('kg' in beide NL+EN), `units.lb` ('lb' in beide). Hook `useUnits()` leest profiles.units uit cache (TanStack Query, stale-while-revalidate op profile-hook uit T-113). Alle bestaande weergaves van gewicht (workout-history cards, exercise-picker last-set preview, active workout rows, PR displays) migreren in een follow-up pass — MVP: alleen nieuwe profile-tab surfaces gebruiken formatWeight, oude surfaces blijven 'kg' literal. tasks.title: Delete-account Edge Function (cascading delete + GDPR)
tasks.notes: 2026-04-19 PM-tranche NEW. GDPR Article 17 compliance (Right to Erasure) — EU-verplicht voor launch. Edge Function `delete-account`: ontvangt user JWT, verifieert auth, voert cascading delete uit. Cascade-keten via reeds bestaande FK ON DELETE CASCADE constraints: auth.users delete → profiles.id (CASCADE) → workouts (user_id CASCADE) → workout_sets (workout_id CASCADE) → personal_records (user_id CASCADE) → ai_generation_usage (CASCADE) → ai_generation_logs (CASCADE) → challenges/friendships/leagues (Phase 7 tables moeten bij aanmaak ON DELETE CASCADE hebben — PM flag voor T-701). AUDIT-TRAIL: voor delete, schrijf naar `deletion_audit` table: user_id, deleted_at, reason (optional), initiated_by ('user_self'), ip_address, user_agent. Audit-rij blijft bewaard (GDPR staat anonieme retention toe voor legitimate interest = fraude/juridisch). UI-CONFIRMATIE (T-415 scope): double-confirm modal 'Dit kan NIET ongedaan worden' + typ 'VERWIJDER' om te bevestigen. Na succesvolle delete: client wist AsyncStorage + secure-store + redirect naar welcome. Test in T-801 bug-bash.

tasks.title: Stats-at-a-glance hook (workout-count + total-volume + league-tier)
tasks.notes: 2026-04-19 PM-tranche NEW. Hook `lib/queries/useProfileStats.ts` via TanStack Query. Returns: `{ workoutCount: number, totalVolumeKg: number, leagueTier: string | null, leaguePosition: number | null }`. Data-bronnen: (1) workoutCount = `select count(*) from workouts where user_id = auth.uid()`, (2) totalVolumeKg = sum via bestaande view `workouts_with_totals` (migration 20260419105008 §8) — kan hergebruiken of aggregate function rollen, stem met T-403 af om duplicate queries te voorkomen, (3) leagueTier + leaguePosition = Phase 7 dependency (T-723 league assignment); in Phase 4 retourneert de hook NULL voor league-velden → designer rendert 'Bronze — joining soon' placeholder of hide-if-null. Cache: staleTime 2 min, gcTime 10 min (stats hoeven niet realtime maar wel fresh bij profile-tab refresh). Invalidation: invalidate key `['profileStats', userId]` bij workout-save (T-213 sync success). Display-conversie (kg → lb) = T-414 formatWeight verantwoordelijkheid, hook geeft altijd kg.
